caption: A blue, glowing circular portal effect appears centered against a dark background. Within the center of this glowing blue ring, a rectangular white light begins to form and solidify. As the sequence progresses, the white light transforms into a clear blue banner containing bold, white text. The text on the banner reads "PLUS POLITICS". Below the text, a white semicircular arc is visible. A thin, light-blue curved line briefly arcs over the top of the text before disappearing. The animation moves from a blurred, glitchy light effect to a sharp, legible logo, while the surrounding blue energy of the portal continues to pulse and shimmer.
